questionHtml: Explain why the blue colour of a quinoidal base changes to the red colour of a flavylium cation as pH decreases.
markschemeHtml:
gaining protons

decreases electron density/extent of conjugation «in aromatic backbone»

increases energy of electron transitions

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Explain why the blue colour of a quinoidal base changes to the red colour of a flavylium cation as pH decreases.
